subcodes.first_line: This is the Book sent down by the All-Merciful from the Kingdom of Utterance, that men may recognize this Path which is the truth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله الرحمن من ملکوت البیان لیعترف الناس هذا الصراط الذی کان بالحق
